# AI-Crawler-Blocklist
# Generated: 2026-07-14T14:13:26Z
# Source: https://github.com/ipanalytics/AI-Crawler-Blocklist

Amazonbot
Amzn\-SearchBot
Amzn\-User
anthropic\-ai
Baiduspider
Bytespider
ByteSpider
CCBot
ChatGPT\-User

DuckAssistBot
FacebookBot
